channel.title: Xiaomi 13T MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 13T MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.214.0.VMFMIXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 13T Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 13T Global

Codename: aristotle

Version: OS2.0.214.0.VMFMIXM | 15.0

Size: 7.8 GB

MD5: c5b5fe03af5f93b51b7142a42fa7ce4b

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
